name: Simple Invoice Creation
transcript: Invoice John Smith for standard drywall repair, 450 dollars.

name: Drywall and Painting with Tax and Deposit
transcript: Create an invoice for Acme Corp at 123 Industrial Way. We did bedroom painting for 800 dollars and drywall patching for 300 dollars. Add a ten percent tax rate and we collected a 200 dollar deposit.

name: Spanish Toilet Repair
transcript: Factura a John Doe 200 por reparar el inodoro y ponle tax de siete por ciento

name: Labor Plus Materials Spanglish
transcript: Cobra 5 horas de labor a 45 y ponle 150 de la masilla y la tablaroca a Justin

name: Simple Plumbing Service
transcript: Invoice Maria Lopez for replacing a toilet, 325 dollars.

name: Painting With Deposit Only
transcript: Invoice Sarah Connor for interior painting, 1200 dollars. We collected a 300 dollar deposit.
